mission: Subsea inspection of offshore platform jacket structure. Survey corrosion, marine growth, anode depletion. Maintain safe standoff. Flag anomalies.

platform_telemetry.asset: Gulf of Mexico jacket platform · 42m water depth

keyframes.label: Approach
keyframes.context_summary: Primary jacket leg directly ahead (~3.5m standoff). Cross-brace runs mid-frame, intersecting leg. Light sediment plume lower-right — ROV downwash from prior turn. Approach trajectory nominal.
keyframes.reasoning: Primary leg target acquired at safe 3.5m standoff with cross-brace structure intersecting mid-frame. Sediment plume is residual downwash and non-blocking — proceed to dedicated marine-growth survey on leg face.
keyframes.command: Advance. thrust 0.20 m/s · yaw 0° · standoff 3.0 m

keyframes.label: Marine growth survey
keyframes.context_summary: Heavy biofouling on leg face: two dense barnacle colonies covering ~30% of inspectable surface. Macroalgae cluster on adjacent brace. Standoff stable at 3m.
keyframes.reasoning: Two dense barnacle colonies plus macroalgae cluster cover roughly a third of the leg face — significant biofouling load. Capture for the fouling map, then descend along the leg toward anode location.
keyframes.command: Capture and descend. thrust 0.10 m/s · pitch -8° · standoff 3.0 m

keyframes.label: Anode inspection
keyframes.context_summary: Sacrificial zinc anode at mid-leg. Visible wastage estimate >40% — material loss extends along bottom-third of anode body. Adjacent weld seam intact. Photogrammetry capture recommended.
keyframes.reasoning: Sacrificial anode wastage exceeds 40% — flag for next maintenance window. Adjacent weld seam reads intact. Hold position for photogrammetry capture before continuing perimeter survey.
keyframes.command: Hold and document. thrust 0.0 m/s · standoff 2.4 m

keyframes.label: Brace joint corrosion
keyframes.context_summary: Active corrosion at brace joint B-7. Localized scale pitting visible on lower flange face. Wall thickness measurement strongly indicated. Standoff tight (1.8m) — current pushing ROV toward structure.
keyframes.reasoning: Active corrosion and scale pitting at joint B-7 require UT measurement, but current is pushing standoff to 1.8m — too tight. Back off and yaw into the current before committing to the probe approach.
keyframes.command: Yaw to weather and back off. thrust -0.15 m/s · yaw +12° · standoff 2.5 m

keyframes.label: Hold and document
keyframes.context_summary: Station-keeping at brace joint B-7 for high-resolution photogrammetry capture. Thrust elevated to 35% to counter current. Corrosion patch fills upper frame. Two 4K stills queued.
keyframes.reasoning: Station holding under elevated thrust to counter current; corrosion patch frames cleanly. Two 4K stills queued for the survey report — once committed, transit to mooring chain crossing.

keyframes.label: Mooring chain crossing
keyframes.context_summary: Mooring chain transit at -40.8m. Link wear pattern visible mid-chain — surface abrasion consistent with seabed contact during slack tide. Seabed silt drifting through lower frame, visibility degrading to 4m.
keyframes.reasoning: Chain link wear matches seabed-contact abrasion — record but routine. Silt drift is degrading visibility to 4m; gain altitude above the silt column before approaching the riser.
keyframes.command: Ascend. thrust 0.20 m/s · pitch +6° · standoff 3.5 m

keyframes.label: Riser approach
keyframes.context_summary: Drill riser pipeline centered in frame. Thermal insulation coating intact along majority of inspected length. Localized coating defect at mid-section — possible holiday, ~6cm extent. Cathodic potential reading recommended.
keyframes.reasoning: Drill riser coating is intact except for a ~6cm holiday at mid-section. Close to within CP probe range, take the reading, then mark coordinates and continue the inspection sweep.
keyframes.command: Approach and probe. thrust 0.10 m/s · yaw -8° · standoff 1.5 m

keyframes.label: Egress
keyframes.context_summary: Clearing structure on egress vector. Jacket leg and riser bracket the frame. Mid-frame open water — safe ascent corridor. Mission timeline 73% remaining. Three flagged anomalies queued for surface review.
keyframes.reasoning: Structure cleared on egress with open water mid-frame as the safe ascent corridor. Three anomalies queued — B-7 UT measurement, anode B-3 replacement, riser coating holiday — for surface team handoff.
keyframes.command: Egress. thrust 0.30 m/s · yaw +15° · pitch +4° · standoff 5.0 m
